case_title: DEWITT, TIMOTHY A. VS VALENTIN, MELCHOR et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY DEWITT, TIMOTHY A. AS TO DEFENDANT VALENTIN, MELCHOR VALENTIN, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-1995 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-13-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-11-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
CASE WILL BE HEARD AT 633 FOLSOM ST. DEPT. 1. PLFT REFUSED TO BE HEARD BY A COMMISSIONER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALENTIN, MELCHOR VALENTIN, MICHELLE PLFT FAILED TO APPEAR FOR THE HEARING. THE COURT WAITED UNTIL 9:28 AM. PLAINTIFF STILL NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COURT GRANTED OWN MOTION TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE FOR PLFT'S FAILURE TO PROSECUTE HIS CASE DEFT'S WERE PRESENT AT 9:00 AM. CASE WAS HEARD BY
JUDGE WICK IN DEPT. 1, 633 FOLSOM ST. S.F.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEWITT, TIMOTHY A. HEARING SET FOR MAY-30-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CASE WILL BE TRANSFERRED TO 633 FOLSOM ST. DEPT 1 9:00 AM. PLFT CHALLENGE COMMISSIONER. PER J. STOTT PLFT CAN FILE MOTION TO VACATE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-30-1995, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEWITT, TIMOTHY A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALENTIN, MELCHOR VALENTIN, MICHELLE $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $291.00, CASE HEARD BY JUDGE WICK IN DEPT. 1 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VALENTIN, MELCHOR VALENTIN, MICHELLE
